bwa-mem2
========

# Available modules


The overview below shows which bwa-mem2 installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using bwa-mem2, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load bwa-mem2/2.3-GCC-14.3.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
